h6cca183bg5efbg484fga7bagbc42a8892525: I can hardly wrap my head around what we've just heard. Let's list up the facts, shall we?
ha29e1a86g6b7ag4507gad15gc128ecf84449: There are other people here with tadpoles in their heads.
ha858ed42g5861g4aa6gb817g5032cf99c4e9: These people don't realise they have tadpoles in their heads.
hefb03506gb973g4f88g9ba4g9c2f9be3315c: They can hear the tadpoles speak to them, and they think it's a new god.
hc68d819dgb479g4932g8c4cg330339039221: I don't know about you, but to me, none of this makes any logical sense.
h7b5a8314g2c16g44b5g9277gbad33383e33c: I concur. There doesn't seem to be a logical explanation.
h179bc5e4g1c75g4ad3gad13g4ebf2e2df14c: And yet I suspect something... intelligent behind it all. Some carefully nurtured scheme.
hb30e855aga882g4f58g8742gfe0fe5e12e95: But let's not lose sight of what we've learned here - what joins us and what separates us from these True Souls:
hde7bb6a1g53f6g4de2g8167g5228a2e43b11: They hear a voice we do not hear, a voice that binds them in servitude.
hec9363a1g45d3g4e1egacf2g3153967280f9: As long as we're possessed of our own free will, I venture to say there's hope for us yet.
hdd6aed09g2602g4d22ga28ag01fc28aa83f5: I'm seeing too many coincidences - which tend to add up to conspiracies.
h7926b0c8gc018g4ef0g9458ge6ac6598bac1: Evil cults and grand designs, is it? Mind you, I'll not even dispute the possibility.
hf4cf2199g8fe3g4e53g9fb8g2cad3e3c95d6: I don't care about logic, I care about solutions.
h93fbbe11g3cccg4914gb255g0df795a1287e: I'm not so sure those are mutually exclusive. If we seek to solve we must seek to comprehend.
